title: Element Web
description: Glossy, feature-rich Matrix web client for secure, decentralized chat, voice and video collaboration.
installation: Element Web is a STATELESS static client (nginx on port 80); it does NOT store data itself. It is the frontend for a Matrix homeserver, which you must deploy separately. Run a Synapse homeserver (which needs its own Postgres) and point Element at it. Configure the homeserver/identity-server URLs by mounting a config.json at /app/config.json or via the ELEMENT_WEB_PORT / templated config; at minimum set default_server_config (m.homeserver base_url) to your Synapse URL. No add-ons or volumes are required for Element Web itself.
